"""Data processing pipeline."""
from src.parser import parse
from src.transform import transform
from src.formatter import format_output


def process(raw_input):
    parsed = parse(raw_input)
    transformed = transform(parsed)
    return format_output(transformed)

operations.content:
"""Transform stage of the data pipeline."""
from src.parser import ParseResult

TransformResult = list[str]


def transform(lines: ParseResult) -> TransformResult:
    return [line.upper() for line in lines]
